name: Sring Rolls
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven.
2. Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
3. Roll out the pastry on a floured surface until it reaches desired thickness.
4. Place a small amount of filling in the center of each pastry square or circle.
5. Brush the edges of the pastry with beaten egg.
6. Fold the pastry over the filling, sealing the edges by brushing them with more egg.
7. Place the rolls on the prepared baking sheet.
8. Bake until golden brown.
9. Turn off and turn oven to cool completely before serving.
